name: plugin
description: Claude Code plugin marketplace for multi-agent review workflows — bundles agent-review-panel (panel-based code/plan review) and plan-review-integrator (integrate review findings into implementation plans). The full review→integrate pipeline in one marketplace.

plugins.name: agent-review-panel
plugins.description: Orchestrate a multi-agent adversarial review panel. 4-6 reviewers with distinct personas independently evaluate work, debate findings across 1-3 rounds, then a supreme judge renders the final verdict. Auto-detected Precise/Exhaustive mode, severity verification, tiered L0/L1/L2 knowledge mining, 10 signal groups with domain checklists. Based on ChatEval, AutoGen, DMAD, CONSENSAGENT, and Trust or Escalate research.

plugins.name: plan-review-integrator
plugins.description: Integrate structured review panel findings into implementation plan documents with full traceability. Pairs with agent-review-panel as the integrate stage of a review→integrate pipeline.
